SEARCH
Package org.key_project.prover.indexing

Interface RuleIndex<Application extends RuleApp>

All Superinterfaces:
Cloneable
All Known Implementing Classes:
TacletIndex
public interface RuleIndex<Application extends RuleApp> extends Cloneable

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    add(Application tacletApplication)
    adds a new Taclet with instantiation information to this index.
    void
    add(Rule taclet)
    adds a new Taclet with instantiation information to this index.
    void
    addTaclets(Iterable<Application> tacletAppList)
    adds a set of NoPosTacletApp to this index
    @NonNull Set<Application>
    allNoPosTacletApps()
    retrieves all RuleApps managed by this index
    Object
    clone()
    clones the index
    RuleIndex<Application>
    copy()
    copies the index
    ImmutableList<Application>
    getAntecedentTaclet(PosInOccurrence pos, RuleFilter filter, LogicServices services)
    get all Taclets for the antecedent.
    ImmutableList<Application>
    getNoFindTaclet(RuleFilter filter, LogicServices services)
    get all Taclets having no find expression.
    Set<Application>
    getPartialInstantiatedApps()
    returns an unmodifiable set with all partial instantiated no pos taclet apps
    ImmutableList<Application>
    getRewriteTaclet(PosInOccurrence pos, RuleFilter filter, LogicServices services)
    get all Rewrite-Taclets.
    ImmutableList<Application>
    getSuccedentTaclet(PosInOccurrence pos, RuleFilter filter, LogicServices services)
    get all Taclets for the succedent.
    @Nullable Application
    lookup(String name)
    returns a NoPosTacletApp whose Taclet has a name that equals the given name.
    Application
    lookup(Name name)
    returns a NoPosTacletApp whose Taclet has a name that equals the given name.
    void
    remove(Application tacletApplication)
    removes a Taclet with the given instantiation information from this index.
    void
    removeTaclets(Iterable<Application> tacletAppList)
    removes the given NoPosTacletApps from this index

  • Method Details

    • addTaclets

      void addTaclets(Iterable<Application> tacletAppList)
      adds a set of NoPosTacletApp to this index
      Parameters:
      tacletAppList - the NoPosTacletApps to be added

    • add

      void add(Rule taclet)
      adds a new Taclet with instantiation information to this index. If rule instance is not known rule is not added
      Parameters:
      taclet - the Taclet and its instantiation info to be added

    • add

      void add(Application tacletApplication)
      adds a new Taclet with instantiation information to this index. If rule instance is not known rule is not added
      Parameters:
      tacletApplication - the Taclet and its instantiation info to be added

    • remove

      void remove(Application tacletApplication)
      removes a Taclet with the given instantiation information from this index.
      Parameters:
      tacletApplication - the Taclet and its instantiation info to be removed

    • removeTaclets

      void removeTaclets(Iterable<Application> tacletAppList)
      removes the given NoPosTacletApps from this index
      Parameters:
      tacletAppList - the NoPosTacletApps to be removed

    • copy

      RuleIndex<Application> copy()
      copies the index

    • clone

      Object clone()
      clones the index

    • allNoPosTacletApps

      @NonNull Set<Application> allNoPosTacletApps()
      retrieves all RuleApps managed by this index
      Returns:
      all RuleApps managed by this index

    • getAntecedentTaclet

      ImmutableList<Application> getAntecedentTaclet(PosInOccurrence pos, RuleFilter filter, LogicServices services)
      get all Taclets for the antecedent.
      Parameters:
      pos - the PosOfOccurrence describing the formula for which to look for top level taclets
      filter - Only return taclets the filter selects
      services - the Services object encapsulating information about the java datastructures like (static)types etc.
      Returns:
      IList containing all applicable rules and the corresponding instantiations to get the rule fit.

    • getSuccedentTaclet

      ImmutableList<Application> getSuccedentTaclet(PosInOccurrence pos, RuleFilter filter, LogicServices services)
      get all Taclets for the succedent.
      Parameters:
      pos - the PosOfOccurrence describing the formula for which to look for top level taclets
      filter - Only return taclets the filter selects
      services - the Services object encapsulating information about the java datastructures like (static)types etc.
      Returns:
      IList containing all applicable rules and the corresponding instantiations to get the rule fit.

    • getRewriteTaclet

      ImmutableList<Application> getRewriteTaclet(PosInOccurrence pos, RuleFilter filter, LogicServices services)
      get all Rewrite-Taclets.
      Parameters:
      filter - Only return taclets the filter selects
      services - the Services object encapsulating information about the java datastructures like (static)types etc.
      Returns:
      IList containing all applicable rules and the corresponding instantiations to get the rule fit.

    • getNoFindTaclet

      ImmutableList<Application> getNoFindTaclet(RuleFilter filter, LogicServices services)
      get all Taclets having no find expression.
      Parameters:
      filter - Only return taclets the filter selects
      services - the Services object encapsulating information about the java datastructures like (static)types etc.
      Returns:
      IList containing all applicable rules and an empty part for the instantiations because no instantiations are necessary.

    • lookup

      Application lookup(Name name)
      returns a NoPosTacletApp whose Taclet has a name that equals the given name. If more Taclets have the same name an arbitrary Taclet with that name is returned.
      Parameters:
      name - the name to lookup
      Returns:
      the found NoPosTacletApp or null if no matching Taclet is there

    • lookup

      @Nullable Application lookup(String name)
      returns a NoPosTacletApp whose Taclet has a name that equals the given name. If more Taclets have the same name an arbitrary Taclet with that name is returned.
      Parameters:
      name - the name to lookup
      Returns:
      the found NoPosTacletApp or null if no matching Taclet is there

    • getPartialInstantiatedApps

      Set<Application> getPartialInstantiatedApps()
      returns an unmodifiable set with all partial instantiated no pos taclet apps
      Returns:
      set with all partial instantiated NoPosTacletApps
